citation.author: Mariano
citation.journal_title: Advances in bioinformatics and computational biology

Setubal & W. M. Silva (Eds.), Advances in bioinformatics and computational biology (pp. 235–246). Springer International Publishing. https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-030-65775-8_22

citation.article_title: ReportingTools: An automated result processing and presentation toolkit for high-throughput genomic analyses
citation.author: Huntley
citation.unstructured_citation: Huntley, M. A., Larson, J. L., Chaivorapol, C., Becker, G., Lawrence, M., Hackney, J. A., & Kaminker, J. S. (2013). ReportingTools: An automated result processing and presentation toolkit for high-throughput genomic analyses. Bioinformatics, 29(24), 3220–3221. https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btt551
